metadata.description: PPT Master (Richard's optimized fork of Hugo He's ppt-master) — AI generates natively editable PPTX from any document, with playable video/audio embedding + the eink-magazine visual style

plugins.name: ppt-master-richard
plugins.description: Richard's optimized fork of ppt-master (base by Hugo He). Generate natively editable PPTX from PDF / DOCX / URL / Markdown — real DrawingML shapes, text boxes, charts, animations — plus playable video/audio embedding (embed_media.py) and the eink-magazine visual style. Note: run `pip install -r requirements.txt` inside the installed plugin directory for the Python post-processing scripts to work.
